name: glideLoop
purpose: Endless diagonal gliding — continuous drifting along both axes (translate X+Y; compositor-friendly).
template:
{{css target}} { animation: motion-glideLoop-{{css id}} {{css params.duration}}s ease-in-out infinite alternate; }
@keyframes motion-glideLoop-{{css id}} { from { transform: translate(-{{css params.distance}}, -{{css params.distance}}) } to { transform: translate({{css params.distance}}, {{css params.distance}}) } }
